title: Smart Society Management System
description: A full-stack society management platform where residents can manage wings, bookings, and community features. Includes user authentication, wing management, and verified community system.

title: MERN Stack Vehicle Rental System
description: A full-stack vehicle rental system where users can browse vehicles, select rental dates, calculate total cost, and make bookings. Includes user authentication, vehicle management, and booking history.

title: MERN Stack Doctor Appointment System
description: A doctor appointment booking application that allows users to schedule appointments, manage patient details, and view appointment history. Designed with a clean UI and secure backend APIs.

title: Responsive Website
description: A fully responsive website built using modern HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Focused on clean layout, smooth navigation, and mobile-first design principles.

title: Interactive Web Application
description: An interactive frontend website developed with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript featuring dynamic UI components, animations, and user-friendly interactions.

title: My Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio website built with React and Vite. Features smooth animations, responsive design, project showcase, skills section, and contact form.
